zh.Tenterden, Kent, England: 英國英格蘭肯特騰特爾登
zh.Tenterden, Kent, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭肯特騰特爾登
zh.lifeSummary: 當Nathaniel Ely Sr.於1572年9月28日出生在英國英格蘭肯特騰特爾登時，他的父親George Ely27歲，母親Florence Tylden26歲。他於1597年6月9日與Susan Dowle在英國英格蘭肯特騰特爾登結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於從1607年到1615年在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國肯特比登登。

zh-hans.Tenterden, Kent, England: 英国英格兰肯特騰特爾登
zh-hans.Tenterden, Kent, England, United Kingdom: 英国英格兰肯特騰特爾登
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nathaniel Ely Sr.于1572年9月28日出生在英国英格兰肯特騰特爾登时，他的父亲George Ely27岁，母亲Florence Tylden26岁。他于1597年6月9日与Susan Dowle在英国英格兰肯特騰特爾登结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于从1607年到1615年在他的家乡，埋葬在英国肯特比登登。

nameMeanings.name: Ely
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Ely, a cathedral city on an island in the fens north of Cambridge, so named from Old English ǣl ‘eel’ + gē ‘district’.
English, French, and Breton (Finistère): from the Middle English, Old French personal name Elie, Hely (Elijah in the King James Bible); see Ellis and Elias .

variants.name: Ellis
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Elis, an Old French vernacular form of Elias, the Latin and New Testament Greek form of Hebrew Eliyahu; see Elijah and compare Elias , Lias , Ely .
English: possibly in some instances from the Middle English female personal name Elice, a pet form of Elizabeth .

Welsh: from Elis, a shortened form of the Welsh personal name Elisse (earlier Elisedd, a derivative of elus ‘kindly, benevolent’). As usual in Welsh, the stress in Elisse is on the penultimate syllable -li-, which shifts to initial El- when the name is shortened to Elis. It later became confused with Ellis in 1 above.

variants.name: Iley
meanings: English (Durham): habitational name from Brent Eleigh or Monks Eleigh in Suffolk, or perhaps from Illey in Worcestershire. The Suffolk placename derives from an Old English personal name Illa (genitive Illan) + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’. The Worcestershire placename derives from the Old English personal name Hilla or Illa + lēah. Alternatively, the name may be a variant of Ely .
Perhaps an Americanized form of German   Ihle  .

variants.name: Elley
meanings: English: variant of   Ely   or   Ella  .

variants.name: Eley
meanings: German: from a vernacular form of the medieval personal name Eligius (see Eligio ), a Christian saint's name.

nameMeanings.name: Nathaniel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of a New Testament name, which is derived from the Greek form of a Hebrew name meaning ‘God has given’ ( compare Nathan , which is sometimes taken as a short form of this name). It was borne by one of the less prominent of Christ's apostles (John 1:45; 21:2), who in fact is probably identical with Bartholomew . The spelling used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament is Nathanael , but this is in much less frequent use as a given name in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Nathaniel Ely Sr. was born on 28 September 1572, in Tenterden, Kent, England, United Kingdom, his father, George Ely, was 27 and his mother, Florence Tylden, was 26. He married Susan Dowle on 9 June 1597, in Tenterden, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died from 1607 to 1615, in his hometown, and was buried in Biddenden, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nathaniel Ely Sr. est né le 28 septembre 1572, à Tenterden, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, George Ely, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Florence Tylden, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Susan Dowle le 9 juin 1597, à Tenterden, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé du 1607 au 1615, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Biddenden, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nathaniel Ely Sr. am 28. September 1572 in Tenterden, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater George Ely 27 und seine Mutter Florence Tylden 26. Er hat am 9. Juni 1597 in Tenterden, Kent, England, United Kingdom Susan Dowle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb von 1607 bis 1615 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Biddenden, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nathaniel Ely Sr. è nato il il 28 settembre 1572 nel Tenterden, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, George Ely, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Florence Tylden, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Susan Dowle il 9 giugno 1597, nel Tenterden, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì da 1607 a 1615, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Biddenden, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Nathaniel Ely Sr.が1572年9月28日にイギリスイギリスケントテンテルデンで生まれた時，父George Elyは27歳，母Florence Tyldenは26歳であった。1597年6月9日にイギリスイギリスケントテンテルデンでSusan Dowleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼はから1607年まで1615年に故郷で死去し，イギリスケントビッドエンデンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Nathaniel Ely Sr.(이)가 1572년 9월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 텐터든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 George Ely(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Florence Tylden(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1597년 6월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 텐터든에서 Susan Dowle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1607년 부터 1615년 까지 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 켄트 비데든에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nathaniel Ely Sr. nasceu em 28 de setembro de 1572, em Tenterden, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, George Ely, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Florence Tylden, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Susan Dowle em 9 de junho de 1597, em Tenterden, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu de 1607 a 1615, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Biddenden, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nathaniel Ely Sr. родился 28 сентября 1572 г. в местности тентирден, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени George Ely было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Florence Tylden, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Susan Dowle 9 июня 1597 г. в местности тентирден, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер с 1607 по 1615 в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности бидденден, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nathaniel Ely Sr. nació el 28 de septiembre de 1572, en Tenterden, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, George Ely, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Florence Tylden, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Susan Dowle el 9 de junio de 1597, en Tenterden, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió desde 1607 hasta 1615, en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en Biddenden, Kent, Inglaterra.
